name: claude-js
description: Reverse-engineered Anthropic Claude Code CLI — interactive AI coding assistant in the terminal

scripts.build:binary: bun run build && bun build src/entrypoints/cli.tsx --compile --outfile=build/claude-js
scripts.build:win: bun run build && bun build src/entrypoints/cli.tsx --compile --outfile=build/claude-js.exe --windows-hide-console --windows-title=Claude-JS --windows-version=1.0.3
scripts.build:macos: bun run build && bun build src/entrypoints/cli.tsx --compile --outfile=build/claude-js-macos --target=bun
scripts.build:linux: bun run build && bun build src/entrypoints/cli.tsx --compile --outfile=build/claude-js-linux --target=bun
scripts.build:all: echo 'Note: Cross-compilation is not fully supported. Build on each platform separately.' && bun run build:binary
